en: Then what advantage has the Jew? Or what is the value of circumcision?
zh: 這樣說來，猶太人獨特的地方在哪裡呢？割禮又有甚麼益處呢？

en: Much in every way. To begin with, the Jews were entrusted with the oracles of God.
zh: 從各方面來說，的確很多。最重要的，是 神的聖言已經託付了他們。

en: What if some were unfaithful? Does their faithlessness nullify the faithfulness of God?
zh: 即使有人不信，又有甚麼關係呢？難道他們的不信會使 神的信實無效嗎？

en: By no means! Let God be true though every one were a liar, as it is written, "That you may be justified in your words, and prevail when you are judged."
zh: 絕不可能！ 神總是誠實的，人卻是虛謊的，正如經上所記： “你在話語上，顯為公義； 你被論斷時，必然得勝。”

en: But if our unrighteousness serves to show the righteousness of God, what shall we say? That God is unrighteous to inflict wrath on us? (I speak in a human way.)
zh: 我且照著人的見解來說，我們的不義若彰顯 神的義，我們可以說甚麼呢？難道降怒的 神是不義的嗎？

en: By no means! For then how could God judge the world?
zh: 絕對不是！如果是這樣， 神怎能審判世界呢？

en: But if through my lie God's truth abounds to his glory, why am I still being condemned as a sinner?
zh: 但是 神的誠實，如果因我的虛謊而更加顯出他的榮耀來，為甚麼我還要像罪人一樣受審判呢？

en: And why not do evil that good may come?- as some people slanderously charge us with saying. Their condemnation is just.
zh: 為甚麼不說：“我們去作惡以成善吧！” 這種人被定罪是理所當然的。

en: What then? Are we Jews any better off? No, not at all. For we have already charged that all, both Jews and Greeks, are under the power of sin,
zh: 那又怎麼樣呢？我們比他們強嗎？絕不是的。因為我們已經控訴過，無論是猶太人或是希臘人，都在罪惡之下，

en: as it is written: "None is righteous, no, not one;
zh: 正如經上所說： “沒有義人，連一個也沒有，

en: no one understands; no one seeks for God.
zh: 沒有明白的，沒有尋求 神的；

en: All have turned aside; together they have become worthless; no one does good, not even one."
zh: 人人都偏離了正道，一同變成污穢； 沒有行善的，連一個也沒有。

en: "Their throat is an open grave; they use their tongues to deceive." "The venom of asps is under their lips."
zh: 他們的喉嚨是敞開的墳墓， 他們用舌頭弄詭詐， 他們嘴裡有虺蛇的毒，

en: "Their mouth is full of curses and bitterness."
zh: 滿口是咒罵和惡毒；

en: "Their feet are swift to shed blood;
zh: 為了殺人流血，他們的腳步飛快，

en: in their paths are ruin and misery,
zh: 在經過的路上留下毀滅和悲慘。

en: and the way of peace they have not known."
zh: 和睦之道，他們不曉得，

en: "There is no fear of God before their eyes."
zh: 他們的眼中也不怕 神。”

en: Now we know that whatever the law says it speaks to those who are under the law, so that every mouth may be stopped, and the whole world may be held accountable to God.
zh: 然而我們曉得，凡律法所說的，都是對在律法之下的人說的，好讓每一個人都沒有話可講，使全世界的人都伏在 神的審判之下。

en: For by works of the law no human being will be justified in his sight, since through the law comes knowledge of sin.
zh: 沒有一個人可以靠行律法，在 神面前得稱為義，因為藉著律法，人對於罪才有充分的認識。

en: But now the righteousness of God has been manifested apart from the law, although the Law and the Prophets bear witness to it-
zh: 現在，有律法和先知的話可以證明： 神的義在律法之外已經顯明出來，

en: the righteousness of God through faith in Jesus Christ for all who believe. For there is no distinction:
zh: 就是 神的義，因著信耶穌基督，毫無區別地臨到所有信的人。

en: for all have sinned and fall short of the glory of God,
zh: 因為人人都犯了罪，虧缺了 神的榮耀，

en: and are justified by his grace as a gift, through the redemption that is in Christ Jesus,
zh: 但他們卻因著 神的恩典，藉著在基督耶穌裡的救贖，就白白地稱義。

en: whom God put forward as a propitiation by his blood, to be received by faith. This was to show God's righteousness, because in his divine forbearance he had passed over former sins.
zh: 神設立了耶穌為贖罪祭 ，是憑著他的血，藉著人的信，為的是要顯明 神的義；因為 神用忍耐的心寬容了人從前所犯的罪，

en: It was to show his righteousness at the present time, so that he might be just and the justifier of the one who has faith in Jesus.
zh: 好在現今顯明他的義，使人知道他自己為義，又稱信耶穌的人為義。

en: Then what becomes of our boasting? It is excluded. By what kind of law? By a law of works? No, but by the law of faith.
zh: 這樣，有甚麼可誇的呢？沒有可誇的了。憑甚麼準則說沒有的呢？憑行為嗎？不是的，而是以信心為準則說的。

en: For we hold that one is justified by faith apart from works of the law.
zh: 因為我們認定，人稱義是由於信，並不是靠行律法。

en: Or is God the God of Jews only? Is he not the God of Gentiles also? Yes, of Gentiles also,
zh: 難道 神只是猶太人的 神嗎？不也是外族人的 神嗎？是的，他也是外族人的 神。

en: since God is one. He will justify the circumcised by faith and the uncircumcised through faith.
zh: 神既然只有一位，他就以信為準則稱受割禮的為義，也要以信為準則稱沒有受割禮的為義。

en: Do we then overthrow the law by this faith? By no means! On the contrary, we uphold the law.
zh: 這樣說來，我們以信廢掉了律法嗎？絕對不是，倒是鞏固了律法。
